name: Webhook Inbound (multi-platform)
description: Single aiohttp listener for inbound webhooks from Teams (Outgoing Webhook), DingTalk (Outgoing), and Feishu (Custom Bot Callback). Each platform has its own signature scheme verified per-token. Reuses the same token store as the generic 'webhook' plugin so `oc webhook create` works for these too. WeCom-Callback and Yuanbao are intrinsically outbound-only.
